  • util
  • db
  • bun
  • extract
  • react

  • api
  • Providers
  • Cache
  • APICache
  • EndpointCache
  • Endpoints
  • Endpoint store
  • cloudflare
  • markup
  • test
  • schema
  • sequence
  • firestore
  • store

    • EndpointCache

    Cache of EndpointStore objects for a single endpoint, keyed by serialized payload.

    • Use get(payload) to retrieve or create the EndpointStore for a given payload.

    Methods

    Go

    get()

    (payload: P, caller: AnyCaller = this.get) => EndpointStore<P, R>

    Get (or create) the EndpointStore for the given payload.

    Go

    call()

    (payload: P, maxAge: number = AVOID_REFRESH, caller: AnyCaller = this.call) => Promise<R>

    Fetch (or return a cached result) for the given payload.

    Go

    invalidate()

    (payload: P, caller: AnyCaller = this.invalidate) => void

    Invalidate a specific store.

    Go

    invalidateAll()

    () => void

    Invalidate all stores.

    Go

    refresh()

    (payload: P, maxAge?: number, caller: AnyCaller = this.invalidate) => Promise<void>

    Trigger a refetch on a specific store.

    Go

    refreshAll()

    (maxAge?: number) => Promise<void>

    Trigger a refetch on all stores.

    Properties

    Go

    endpoint

    Endpoint<P, R>
    Go

    provider

    APIProvider<P, R>
